interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the depth of the Mediterranean Sea?
interactions.intention: What is the depth of the Mediterranean Sea?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DEPTH FROM MONDIAL_SEA WHERE NAME = 'Mediterranean Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which seas merge with the Mediterranean Sea?
interactions.intention: Which seas merge with the Mediterranean Sea?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SEA2 FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH WHERE SEA1 = 'Mediterranean Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the area of these seas?
interactions.intention: What is the area of the seas that merge with the Mediterranean Sea?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MS.NAME, MS.AREA FROM MONDIAL_SEA MS JOIN MONDIAL_MERGESWITH MM ON MS.NAME = MM.SEA2 WHERE MM.SEA1 = 'Mediterranean Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which airports are located in the city of Praha?
interactions.intention: Which airports are located in the city of Praha?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT WHERE CITY = 'Praha'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of that airport?
interactions.intention: What is the elevation of the airport located in Praha?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT WHERE CITY = 'Praha'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which country does this city belong to?
interactions.intention: Which country does the city of Praha belong to?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_COUNTRY.NAME FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_AIRPORT ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE WHERE MONDIAL_AIRPORT.CITY = 'Praha'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which cities are located on the Yangtze river?
interactions.intention: Which cities are located on the Yangtze river?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT CITY FROM MONDIAL_LOCATED WHERE RIVER = 'Yangtze'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of these cities in the most recent year?
interactions.intention: What is the population of the cities located on the Yangtze river in the most recent year?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT M1.CITY, M1.POPULATION, M1.YEAR FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS M1 INNER JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATED M2 ON M1.CITY = M2.CITY AND M1.COUNTRY = M2.COUNTRY AND M1.PROVINCE = M2.PROVINCE WHERE M2.RIVER = 'Yangtze' AND M1.YEAR = (SELECT MAX(YEAR) FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS WHERE CITY = M1.CITY)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What other names are used for these cities?
interactions.intention: What other names are used for the cities located on the Yangtze river?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT M1.CITY, M1.OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME M1 INNER JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATED M2 ON M1.CITY = M2.CITY AND M1.COUNTRY = M2.COUNTRY AND M1.PROVINCE = M2.PROVINCE WHERE M2.RIVER = 'Yangtze'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of countries in Europe in 2012?
interactions.intention: What is the population of countries in Europe in 2012?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT = 'Europe' AND MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.YEAR = 2012

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which continent has the largest total area?
interactions.intention: Which continent has the largest total area?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT WHERE AREA = (SELECT MAX(AREA) FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What percentage of Albania is in Europe?
interactions.intention: What percentage of Albania is in Europe?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES WHERE COUNTRY = 'AL' AND CONTINENT = 'Europe'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list all deserts with an area larger than 100,000 sq km?
interactions.intention: List all deserts with an area larger than 100,000 sq km.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT WHERE AREA > 100000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which country has the Namib desert?
interactions.intention: Identify the country that has the Namib desert.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT WHERE DESERT = 'Namib'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the GDP of that country?
interactions.intention: What is the GDP of the country identified in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT GDP FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY WHERE COUNTRY = (SELECT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT WHERE DESERT = 'Namib')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers are located in the province of Sachsen-Anhalt?
interactions.intention: Which rivers are located in the province of Sachsen-Anhalt?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the countries these rivers flow through?
interactions.intention: Can you list the countries where the rivers from the previous question flow through?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the sources of these rivers?
interactions.intention: What are the sources of the rivers identified in the earlier questions?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.RIVER, MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY ON MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.RIVER = MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.RIVER WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names of lakes located in Xinjiang?
interactions.intention: Can you tell me the names of lakes located in Xinjiang?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT LAKE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE WHERE PROVINCE = 'Xinjiang'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the area of these lakes?
interactions.intention: What is the area of the lakes located in Xinjiang?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ML.AREA FROM MONDIAL_LAKE ML JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE MGL ON ML.NAME = MGL.LAKE WHERE MGL.PROVINCE = 'Xinjiang'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Do any of these lakes have islands?
interactions.intention: Do any of the lakes located in Xinjiang have islands?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MGL.LAKE FROM MONDIAL_ISLANDIN MI JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE MGL ON MI.LAKE = MGL.LAKE WHERE MGL.PROVINCE = 'Xinjiang'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the mountains located in India?
interactions.intention: What are the mountains located in India?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN WHERE COUNTRY = 'IND'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of Anamudi?
interactions.intention: What is the elevation of Anamudi?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN WHERE NAME = 'Anamudi'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which province is Anamudi located in?
interactions.intention: Which province is Anamudi located in?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN WHERE MOUNTAIN = 'Anamudi'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries border the Sea of Japan?
interactions.intention: Which countries border the Sea of Japan?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA WHERE SEA = 'Sea of Japan'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What type of governments do these countries have?
interactions.intention: What type of governments do the countries bordering the Sea of Japan have?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_POLITICS.GOVERNMENT FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS ON MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_POLITICS.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA = 'Sea of Japan'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me their independence dates too?
interactions.intention: What are the independence dates of the countries bordering the Sea of Japan?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_POLITICS.INDEPENDENCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS ON MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_POLITICS.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA = 'Sea of Japan'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which mountains are located on islands?
interactions.intention: Which mountains are located on islands?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the tallest mountain among them?
interactions.intention: What is the tallest mountain among the mountains located on islands?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.MOUNTAIN, MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN ON MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.MOUNTAIN = MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.NAME ORDER BY MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.ELEVATION DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And which island is it located on?
interactions.intention: Which island is the tallest mountain among the mountains located on islands located on?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN ON MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.MOUNTAIN = MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.NAME ORDER BY MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.ELEVATION DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which seas merge with the Andaman Sea?
interactions.intention: Which seas merge with the Andaman Sea?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SEA2 FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH WHERE SEA1 = 'Andaman Sea';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the area and depth of these seas?
interactions.intention: What is the area and depth of the seas merging with the Andaman Sea?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_SEA.AREA, MONDIAL_SEA.DEPTH FROM MONDIAL_SEA JOIN MONDIAL_MERGESWITH ON MONDIAL_SEA.NAME = MONDIAL_MERGESWITH.SEA2 WHERE MONDIAL_MERGESWITH.SEA1 = 'Andaman Sea';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also tell me the depth of the Andaman Sea itself?
interactions.intention: What is the depth of the Andaman Sea?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DEPTH FROM MONDIAL_SEA WHERE NAME = 'Andaman Sea';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers flow through the lake Saimaa?
interactions.intention: Which rivers flow through the lake Saimaa?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT RIVER FROM MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH WHERE LAKE = 'Saimaa'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the area of those rivers?
interactions.intention: What is the area of the rivers flowing through the lake Saimaa?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ML.AREA FROM MONDIAL_LAKE ML JOIN MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH MRT ON ML.NAME = MRT.RIVER WHERE MRT.LAKE = 'Saimaa'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what is the elevation of those rivers?
interactions.intention: What is the elevation of the rivers flowing through the lake Saimaa?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ML.ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_LAKE ML JOIN MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH MRT ON ML.NAME = MRT.RIVER WHERE MRT.LAKE = 'Saimaa'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What other names are used for cities in Russia?
interactions.intention: What are the alternative names for cities in Russia?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT CITY, OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME WHERE COUNTRY = 'R'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Are any of these cities located near a river?
interactions.intention: Which of the cities with alternative names in Russia are located near a river?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT M1.CITY, M1.OTHERNAME, M2.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME M1 JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATED M2 ON M1.CITY = M2.CITY AND M1.COUNTRY = M2.COUNTRY WHERE M1.COUNTRY = 'R' AND M2.RIVER IS NOT NULL

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What provinces are these cities in?
interactions.intention: What are the provinces of the cities with alternative names in Russia that are located near a river?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT M1.CITY, M1.OTHERNAME, M1.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME M1 JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATED M2 ON M1.CITY = M2.CITY AND M1.COUNTRY = M2.COUNTRY WHERE M1.COUNTRY = 'R' AND M2.RIVER IS NOT NULL

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the area of each continent?
interactions.intention: What is the area of each continent?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, AREA FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries are 100% in Europe?
interactions.intention: Which countries are entirely located in Europe?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES WHERE CONTINENT = 'Europe' AND PERCENTAGE = 100

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the main religions of those countries?
interactions.intention: What are the main religions of the countries entirely located in Europe?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MR.COUNTRY, MR.NAME, MR.PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_RELIGION MR JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ME ON MR.COUNTRY = ME.COUNTRY WHERE ME.CONTINENT = 'Europe' AND ME.PERCENTAGE = 100

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers flow into the North Sea?
interactions.intention: Which rivers flow into the North Sea?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_RIVER WHERE SEA = 'North Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the length of the Trent river?
interactions.intention: What is the length of the Trent river?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_RIVER WHERE NAME = 'Trent'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the source elevation of this river?
interactions.intention: What is the source elevation of the Trent river?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SOURCEELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_RIVER WHERE NAME = 'Trent'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers flow through the country 'CH' and province 'Aargau'?
interactions.intention: Which rivers flow through the country 'CH' and province 'Aargau'?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER WHERE COUNTRY = 'CH' AND PROVINCE = 'Aargau';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the meta information of these rivers?
interactions.intention: Can you tell me the meta information of the rivers retrieved earlier?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT META_REPCOL FROM MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER WHERE COUNTRY = 'CH' AND PROVINCE = 'Aargau';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Now, I want to know if these rivers have any sources mentioned in the database.
interactions.intention: Do the rivers retrieved earlier have any sources mentioned in the database?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE INNER JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER ON MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.RIVER = MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.RIVER WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.COUNTRY = 'CH' AND MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.PROVINCE = 'Aargau';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the GDP of Greece?
interactions.intention: What is the GDP of Greece?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT GDP FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY WHERE COUNTRY = 'GR';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What percentage of Greece's economy is based on agriculture?
interactions.intention: What percentage of Greece's economy is based on agriculture?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT AGRICULTURE FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY WHERE COUNTRY = 'GR';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How does Greece's inflation rate compare?
interactions.intention: What is the inflation rate of Greece?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT INFLATION FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY WHERE COUNTRY = 'GR';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which cities in Greece have a population greater than 100,000?
interactions.intention: Which cities in Greece have a population greater than 100,000?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITY.NAME FROM MONDIAL_CITY JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY ON MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE WHERE MONDIAL_COUNTRY.NAME = 'Greece' AND MONDIAL_CITY.POPULATION > 100000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of these cities?
interactions.intention: What is the elevation of the cities in Greece with a population greater than 100,000?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITY.NAME, MONDIAL_CITY.ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_CITY JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY ON MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE WHERE MONDIAL_COUNTRY.NAME = 'Greece' AND MONDIAL_CITY.POPULATION > 100000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what are their coordinates?
interactions.intention: What are the coordinates of the cities in Greece with a population greater than 100,000?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITY.NAME, MONDIAL_CITY.LATITUDE, MONDIAL_CITY.LONGITUDE FROM MONDIAL_CITY JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY ON MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE WHERE MONDIAL_COUNTRY.NAME = 'Greece' AND MONDIAL_CITY.POPULATION > 100000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of Sankt Peterburg in the most recent year available?
interactions.intention: What is the population of Sankt Peterburg in the most recent year available?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS WHERE CITY = 'Sankt Peterburg' AND YEAR = (SELECT MAX(YEAR) FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS WHERE CITY = 'Sankt Peterburg')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which river is Sankt Peterburg located on?
interactions.intention: Which river is Sankt Peterburg located on?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT RIVER FROM MONDIAL_LOCATED WHERE CITY = 'Sankt Peterburg'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Does Sankt Peterburg have any other names?
interactions.intention: Does Sankt Peterburg have any other names?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME WHERE CITY = 'Sankt Peterburg'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of the countries in Europe in 2012?
interactions.intention: What is the population of the countries in Europe in 2012?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT = 'Europe' AND MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.YEAR = 2012

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What percentage of each country's territory is in Europe?
interactions.intention: What percentage of each country's territory is in Europe?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES WHERE CONTINENT = 'Europe'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the major ethnic groups in those countries?
interactions.intention: What are the major ethnic groups in the countries mentioned previously?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.NAME, MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT = 'Europe'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which deserts have an area greater than 100,000 square kilometers?
interactions.intention: Which deserts have an area greater than 100,000 square kilometers?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT WHERE AREA > 100000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries have deserts larger than that?
interactions.intention: Which countries have deserts larger than 100,000 square kilometers?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT WHERE DESERT IN (SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT WHERE AREA > 100000)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the GDP of these countries?
interactions.intention: What is the GDP of countries that have deserts larger than 100,000 square kilometers?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, GDP FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY WHERE COUNTRY IN (SELECT DISTINCT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT WHERE DESERT IN (SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT WHERE AREA > 100000))

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list all the rivers in Germany along with their provinces?
interactions.intention: List all the rivers in Germany along with their provinces.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT RIVER, PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE COUNTRY = 'D' UNION SELECT RIVER, PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER WHERE COUNTRY = 'D';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which of these provinces has the largest population?
interactions.intention: Find the province with the largest population among the provinces listed in the previous interaction.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCE WHERE NAME IN (SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE COUNTRY = 'D' UNION SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER WHERE COUNTRY = 'D') ORDER BY POPULATION DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the area of this province?
interactions.intention: What is the area of the province with the largest population identified in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT AREA FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCE WHERE NAME = (SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCE WHERE NAME IN (SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE COUNTRY = 'D' UNION SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER WHERE COUNTRY = 'D') ORDER BY POPULATION DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY);

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which provinces are located in the country 'DK'?
interactions.intention: Which provinces are located in the country 'DK'?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCE WHERE COUNTRY = 'DK'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of these provinces?
interactions.intention: What is the population of the provinces located in the country 'DK'?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCE WHERE COUNTRY = 'DK'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also tell me their capitals?
interactions.intention: What are the capitals of the provinces located in the country 'DK'?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, CAPITAL FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCE WHERE COUNTRY = 'DK'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list all the lakes in the Xinjiang province?
interactions.intention: Can you list all the lakes in the Xinjiang province?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT LAKE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE WHERE PROVINCE = 'Xinjiang'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the areas of these lakes?
interactions.intention: What are the areas of the lakes retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, AREA FROM MONDIAL_LAKE WHERE NAME IN (SELECT LAKE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE WHERE PROVINCE = 'Xinjiang')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And which rivers are they connected to?
interactions.intention: Which rivers are the lakes retrieved in the first interaction connected to?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, RIVER FROM MONDIAL_LAKE WHERE NAME IN (SELECT LAKE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE WHERE PROVINCE = 'Xinjiang')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which mountains are located in Kerala?
interactions.intention: What are the mountains located in Kerala?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN WHERE PROVINCE = 'Kerala';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the country of these mountains?
interactions.intention: What is the country of the mountains located in Kerala?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN WHERE PROVINCE = 'Kerala';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What languages are spoken in this country?
interactions.intention: What languages are spoken in the country where Kerala is located?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE WHERE COUNTRY = (SELECT DISTINCT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN WHERE PROVINCE = 'Kerala');

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries are signatories of the organization abbreviated as CD?
interactions.intention: Which countries are signatories of the organization abbreviated as CD?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER WHERE ORGANIZATION = 'CD'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What languages are spoken in these countries?
interactions.intention: What languages are spoken in the countries retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT NAME FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE WHERE COUNTRY IN (SELECT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER WHERE ORGANIZATION = 'CD')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what are the religions in these countries?
interactions.intention: What are the religions in the countries retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT NAME FROM MONDIAL_RELIGION WHERE COUNTRY IN (SELECT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER WHERE ORGANIZATION = 'CD')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries share a border with Albania?
interactions.intention: Which countries share a border with Albania?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_COUNTRY.NAME FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY ON MONDIAL_BORDERS.COUNTRY2 = MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE WHERE MONDIAL_BORDERS.COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of those countries?
interactions.intention: What is the population of the countries that share a border with Albania?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_COUNTRY.NAME, MONDIAL_COUNTRY.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY ON MONDIAL_BORDERS.COUNTRY2 = MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE WHERE MONDIAL_BORDERS.COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what is their infant mortality rate?
interactions.intention: What is the infant mortality rate of the countries that share a border with Albania?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_COUNTRY.NAME, MONDIAL_POPULATION.INFANT_MORTALITY FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY ON MONDIAL_BORDERS.COUNTRY2 = MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE JOIN MONDIAL_POPULATION ON MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE = MONDIAL_POPULATION.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_BORDERS.COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers flow into the Irish Sea?
interactions.intention: Which rivers flow into the Irish Sea?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_RIVER WHERE SEA = 'Irish Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the length of these rivers?
interactions.intention: What is the length of the rivers that flow into the Irish Sea?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_RIVER WHERE SEA = 'Irish Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And their source elevations?
interactions.intention: What are the source elevations of the rivers that flow into the Irish Sea?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, SOURCEELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_RIVER WHERE SEA = 'Irish Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of Chimki?
interactions.intention: What is the population of Chimki?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_CITY WHERE NAME = 'Chimki';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the province of this city?
interactions.intention: What is the province of Chimki?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_CITY WHERE NAME = 'Chimki';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what is the population of this province?
interactions.intention: What is the population of the province where Chimki is located?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCE WHERE NAME = (SELECT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_CITY WHERE NAME = 'Chimki');

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the percentage of Pacific Islanders in NAU?
interactions.intention: What is the percentage of Pacific Islanders in NAU?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP WHERE COUNTRY = 'NAU' AND NAME = 'Pacific Islander'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population growth rate of this country?
interactions.intention: What is the population growth rate of NAU?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT POPULATION_GROWTH FROM MONDIAL_POPULATION WHERE COUNTRY = 'NAU'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what languages are spoken there?
interactions.intention: What languages are spoken in NAU?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE WHERE COUNTRY = 'NAU'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which seas are associated with Japan?
interactions.intention: Which seas are associated with Japan?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SEA FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA WHERE COUNTRY = 'J'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the depths of these seas?
interactions.intention: What are the depths of the seas associated with Japan?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_SEA.NAME, MONDIAL_SEA.DEPTH FROM MONDIAL_SEA INNER JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SEA ON MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA = MONDIAL_SEA.NAME WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.COUNTRY = 'J'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Do any of these seas merge with another sea?
interactions.intention: Do any of the seas associated with Japan merge with another sea?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_MERGESWITH.SEA1, MONDIAL_MERGESWITH.SEA2 FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH INNER JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SEA ON MONDIAL_MERGESWITH.SEA1 = MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.COUNTRY = 'J'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which cities in the Moskovskaya province have a population greater than 150,000?
interactions.intention: Which cities in the Moskovskaya province have a population greater than 150,000?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of these cities?
interactions.intention: What is the elevation of the cities in the Moskovskaya province with a population greater than 150,000?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_CITY WHERE PROVINCE = 'Moskovskaya' AND POPULATION > 150000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Are there any international organizations headquartered in these cities?
interactions.intention: Are there any international organizations headquartered in the cities in the Moskovskaya province with a population greater than 150,000?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.NAME FROM MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION JOIN MONDIAL_CITY ON MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.CITY = MONDIAL_CITY.NAME WHERE MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE = 'Moskovskaya' AND MONDIAL_CITY.POPULATION > 150000

interactions.intention: What is the elevation of the airports located in the Czech Republic?

interactions.intention: Which type of government does the Czech Republic have?

interactions.intention: Which ethnic groups are found in European countries?

interactions.utterance: Which airports are located in the Czech Republic?
interactions.intention: Which airports are located in the Czech Republic?

interactions.intention: Can you tell me the latitude and longitude of Pardubice airport?

interactions.intention: List all cities located on islands.

interactions.intention: What province is the city Tamatave in?

interactions.intention: What is the population of the province Tamatave belongs to?

interactions.utterance: What is the GDP of Greece?
interactions.intention: What is the GDP of Greece?

interactions.utterance: What percentage of the economy in Greece comes from agriculture?
interactions.intention: What percentage of the economy in Greece comes from agriculture?

interactions.intention: Can you tell me the unemployment rate in Greece?

interactions.intention: What are the names of all deserts in the database?

interactions.intention: What is the area of the Kalahari desert?

interactions.intention: What is the population of the province where the Kalahari desert is located?

interactions.speaker: User

interactions.intention: Which rivers flow through Sachsen-Anhalt?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the countries these rivers belong to?
interactions.intention: What are the countries the rivers flowing through Sachsen-Anhalt belong to?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the estuary elevation of these rivers?
interactions.intention: What is the estuary elevation of the rivers flowing through Sachsen-Anhalt?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MR.ESTUARYELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_RIVER MR JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY MGE ON MR.NAME = MGE.RIVER WHERE MGE.PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt';

interactions.speaker: User

interactions.intention: What are the names and types of lakes in China?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the provinces where these lakes are located?
interactions.intention: What are the provinces where the lakes retrieved in the previous interaction are located?

interactions.utterance: Also, tell me the type of government in China.
interactions.intention: What is the type of government in China?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MP.GOVERNMENT FROM MONDIAL_POLITICS MP WHERE MP.COUNTRY = 'CN'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries are signatories of the CD organization?
interactions.intention: Which countries are signatories of the CD organization?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER WHERE ORGANIZATION = 'CD' AND TYPE = 'signatory';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the main languages spoken in these countries?
interactions.intention: What are the main languages spoken in the countries that are signatories of the CD organization?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.NAME, MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE INNER JOIN MONDIAL_ISMEMBER ON MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.ORGANIZATION = 'CD' AND MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.TYPE = 'signatory';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what is their population growth rate?
interactions.intention: What is the population growth rate of the countries that are signatories of the CD organization?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_POPULATION.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_POPULATION.POPULATION_GROWTH FROM MONDIAL_POPULATION INNER JOIN MONDIAL_ISMEMBER ON MONDIAL_POPULATION.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.ORGANIZATION = 'CD' AND MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.TYPE = 'signatory';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which islands have mountains located on them?
interactions.intention: Which islands have mountains located on them?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND ON MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME = MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.ISLAND

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of the mountains on those islands?
interactions.intention: What is the elevation of the mountains on the islands retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND ON MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.NAME = MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.MOUNTAIN WHERE MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.ISLAND IN (SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND ON MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME = MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.ISLAND)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also tell me the type of these mountains?
interactions.intention: What is the type of the mountains on the islands retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.TYPE FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND ON MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.NAME = MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.MOUNTAIN WHERE MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.ISLAND IN (SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND ON MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME = MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.ISLAND)

interactions.intention: Find organizations established after 1950.

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Where are these organizations located?
interactions.intention: Find the cities where the organizations retrieved in the previous interaction are located.

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries are these cities in?
interactions.intention: Find the countries of the cities retrieved in the previous interaction.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, CITY, COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION WHERE ESTABLISHED > TO_DATE('1950-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')

interactions.intention: Which countries gained independence from the Ottoman Empire?

interactions.speaker: User

interactions.intention: What is the population of the countries that share a border with Albania?

interactions.utterance: Which rivers flow through these lakes?
interactions.intention: Which rivers flow through the lakes retrieved in the previous interaction?

interactions.utterance: Can you also list the provinces where these lakes are located?
interactions.intention: List the provinces where the lakes retrieved in the first interaction are located.
